errors.no_user: Could not identify you. Please try again.
errors.register_first: Your account was not found. Please contact the administrator.
errors.no_active_state: No active operation. Please use the buttons to navigate.
errors.callback_failed: An error occurred while processing your request.

profile.edit_prompt: Edit Profile Choose the field you want to update:
profile.edit_personal_prompt: Personal Data Choose the field you want to update:
profile.view_message: Your Profile Name: {{username}} Email: {{email}} Language: {{language}} Role: {{role}} Personal Data National ID: {{nationalId}} Mobile: {{mobile}} Birth Date: {{birthDate}} Age: {{age}} Gender: {{gender}} Governorate: {{governorate}} Country Code: {{countryCode}} Registered: {{createdAt}}
profile.stats_message: Your Statistics Registered: {{createdAt}} Messages: {{messageCount}} Completed tasks: {{completedTasks}} Active time: {{activeTime}} Rating: {{rating}}
profile.auto_extracted: Your data was automatically extracted from the national ID.

prompt.name: Enter the new name: Maximum 50 characters
prompt.email: Enter the new email address: Example: name@example.com
prompt.language: Enter the new language: ar - Arabic en - English
prompt.role: Enter the new role: USER / ADMIN / SUPER_ADMIN
prompt.national_id: Enter the national ID: 14 digits. Example: 29901011234567
prompt.birth_date: Enter the birth date: Format: YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY Example: 1990-01-15
prompt.gender: Enter the gender: male / female / m / f
prompt.governorate: Enter the governorate: Example: Cairo, Alexandria, Giza
prompt.country_code: Enter the country code: Example: +20 for Egypt, +966 for Saudi Arabia, +971 for UAE

profile.update_error: An error occurred while updating. Please try again.

users.fetch_error: Could not load users list. Please try again later.
users.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this feature.
users.role_pending: Changing user {{id}} role to {{role}} is under development.

national_id.invalid: Invalid national ID. It must be 14 digits and start with 1, 2, or 3. Example: 29901011234567

mobile.invalid: Invalid mobile number. Enter a valid Egyptian mobile number. Example: 01012345678

birth_date.invalid: Invalid birth date. Use YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY. Example: 1990-01-15
birth_date.out_of_range: Birth date is outside the allowed range (10-120 years).

gender.invalid: Invalid gender. Enter male, female, m, or f.

country_code.invalid: Invalid country code. It must start with + followed by 1-4 digits. Example: +20
